features.name: trailing comma in module port list
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with a trailing comma after the last port before the closing parenthesis

features.name: port name mismatch between declaration and usage
features.description: Code should include a module where port names in the port declaration list use underscores (e.g., INPUT_CLK) but the module body references them without underscores (e.g., INPUTCLK)
